chapter_title.en: Chapter on Scattering Gifts and the Wedding Ceremony

text: 4403 - وَ رَوَى اَلسَّكُونِيُّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: "زُفُّوا عَرَائِسَكُمْ لَيْلاً وَ أَطْعِمُوا ضُحًى".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4403 - It is narrated by Al-Sakooni from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"Escort your brides at night and serve food in the morning."
